Latest Updates

What's On

12 May 2026
Met with Australia's Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Defence, Hon Richard Marles
I had the opportunity to ask Hon. Richard Marles how Australia is preparing for the next generation of cyber warfare and protecting critical undersea infrastructure — highlighting the repeated disruptions and sabotage incidents involving Estonia's critical undersea cables.
Watch the conversation ↗
2026
Internet Society Early Career Fellowship
I was recently selected as one of 15 global fellows for the Internet Society Early Career Fellowship. Over the next six months, I will be undertaking a research project under the mentorship of academics and experts from the University of Oxford and the Geneva Centre for Security Policy.
View all 2026 Fellows ↗
2026
$5,000 Student Experience Grant — Digital Duty of Care
At La Trobe University, I was awarded a $5,000 Student Experience Grant to lead a student task force exploring proposed "Digital Duty of Care" legislation. Our team will present its findings at the Australian Internet Governance Forum in Canberra this September, as well as at the Engineering & IT Showcase at La Trobe University.
Read more ↗
About Me

Leader. Expert.
Global Voice.

I'm a Cybersecurity professional and Compliance Officer at .au Domain Administration (auDA), protecting Australia's 4.2 million-domain national namespace from advanced cyber threats, DNS abuse, and critical infrastructure attacks.

A Vice Chancellor's International Excellence Scholar at La Trobe University, I combine deep technical expertise in threat intelligence, penetration testing, and ISO 27001 compliance with extensive global policy experience — having represented Australia at ICANN, the UN Internet Governance Forum, APIGA, and the Australian Internet Governance Forum.

I've studied public policy at Linköping University (Sweden) and nanotechnology security at the University of Tokyo (Japan). I'm an active member of Dexterity Global and a graduate of the DexSchool of Leadership. Outside of work, I love making new friends, learning about different cultures, and staying active through camping, cooking, and running.

Threat IntelligenceDNS Abuse Mitigation Penetration TestingISO 27001/22301 Digital ForensicsIncident Response Essential EightNetwork Security Internet GovernanceTech Policy Risk ManagementOSINT
Organisations around the world have invited, awarded & recognised Rohan Sachdeva
ICANN APAN APIGA Australia Asia-Europe Foundation La Trobe University Internet Society
Work Experience

Professional Track Record

Nov 2023 — Present
Compliance Officer
.au Domain Administration (auDA)
Protecting Australia's 4.2M-domain national namespace. Built automated DNS monitoring and threat intelligence pipelines integrating CTI, VirusTotal, and CleanDNS — reducing high-risk threat response times by 40%. Enforced ISO 27001, ISO 22301, Essential Eight, and Privacy Act compliance. Managed data breaches affecting 1,500 domains and 800 businesses. Represented auDA at WSIS+20, the UN IGF, and ICANN.
Apr 2024 — Present
IT Support Officer & Team Lead
Monash University
Led a team of 7 IT officers during high-stakes eExams. Performed real-time security vulnerability monitoring, forensic post-exam analysis to identify recurring infrastructure flaws, and streamlined incident response workflows to maintain secure exam environments for thousands of students.
2025 — Ongoing
Secretariat & Youth Panel Speaker
Australian Internet Governance Forum (auIGF)
Co-authored the 'Designing Australia's Digital Duty of Care' report. Led an 80-person multistakeholder panel resulting in the official formation of the auIGF NextGen Taskforce with a 2026–27 roadmap for enforceable statutory obligations on digital platforms.
Jul 2023 — Jan 2025
Student Events & Engagement Assistant
La Trobe University
Managed 70+ events including orientation and graduation. Collaborated with 47 low-socioeconomic schools across Melbourne, delivering career guidance and scholarship opportunities. Mentored 56 incoming students.
Key Achievements

Impact at Scale

🛡️
Expert Threat Intelligence & DNS Security
Built automated DNS monitoring pipelines integrating Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI), VirusTotal, and CleanDNS — protecting critical Australian financial and government infrastructure from APTs and phishing campaigns.
⚡
40% Faster Threat Response
Engineered automated incident response workflows cutting high-risk threat response times by 40% while maintaining a 0.03% registry abuse rate across 4.2 million domains.
🎓
$120,000 VC Scholarship
Awarded La Trobe University's Vice Chancellor's International Excellence 100% tuition-waiver scholarship — selected out of 2,000+ applicants. Inducted into the La Trobe Excellence Academy.
Read Feature ↗
🌏
Digital Duty of Care Policy
Co-authored Australia's first framework for enforceable digital platform obligations, resulting in the formation of the auIGF NextGen Taskforce with a 2026–27 implementation roadmap.
🌐
Internet Society Early Career Fellow 2026
One of 15 global fellows. Six-month research project mentored by experts from the University of Oxford and the Geneva Centre for Security Policy.

Industry 5.0 Microcredential
Co-designed a higher-education program on ethical AI and Industry 5.0 at ASEFInnoLab6. Endorsed by Indonesia's Ministry of Higher Education; launching June 2026.
